---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.content-wrap .container-narrow}
A complete list of journal publications and patents is provided below.

## Journal Articles

1. **Liu, Yuchi**, Heow Pueh Lee*, et al. *Coupled moisture–mechanical prediction of compression failure of CFRP laminates.* **International Journal of Mechanical Sciences**, 2026, 309: 111028.
2. **Liu, Yuchi**, Lin, Jinlu, et al. *Degradation and Strength Prediction of CFRP Under Hygrothermal–Mechanical Coupling Environment.* **Polymer Composites**, 2025.
3. **Liu, Yuchi**, Wang, Weiwei, et al. *Investigation of the hygrothermal effects on in-plane failure mechanisms of fine Z-pinned laminates.* **Journal of Composite Materials**, 2025, 59: 627–641.
4. **Liu, Yuchi**, Wang, Han*, et al. *Effect of Hygrothermal Aging on Compression Behavior of CFRP Material with Different Layups.* **Composites Part B: Engineering**, 2024, 270: 111134.
5. **Liu, Yuchi**, Lu, Jing, et al. *Impact resistance optimization of composite laminates based on variable-fidelity surrogate model.* **Polymer Composites**, 2024, 45: 16075–16096.
6. Lin, Jinlu, **Liu, Yuchi***, et al. *Moisture absorption characterization and mechanical properties of CFRP under the combined effects of seawater and continuous bending stress.* **Applied Composite Materials**, 2024.
7. **Liu, Yuchi**, Wang, Han*, et al. *Comparative Experimental Study on Mechanical Properties of CFRP Subjected to Seawater and Hydrostatic Pressure.* **Composites Science and Technology**, 2023, 242: 110193.
8. **Liu, Yuchi**, Wang, Han*, et al. *Experimental and Simulation Study on Compressive Failure Evolution of Multidirectional Laminates with Different Dimensions.* **Engineering Failure Analysis**, 2023, 154: 107633.
9. **Liu, Yuchi**, Cai, Licheng, et al. *Out-of-Plane Properties and Failure Mechanism of Composite Laminates Reinforced With Carbon Z-Pins.* **Applied Composite Materials**, 2023, 30(2): 379–397.

## Patents

1. Wang, Han; **Liu, Yuchi**; Lin, Jinlu. *Testing fixture and simulation method for composite compression performance under coupled external loading.* Chinese invention patent, **CN119985141A**, 2025.
2. He, Ruming; **Liu, Yuchi**; Wang, Han. *Integrated optimization method for two-stage layup path planning of complex curved composite surfaces.* Chinese invention patent, **CN120145782A**, 2025.
:::
